overall.description: A first-person driving sequence through a rain-soaked elevated highway in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The camera moves steadily forward past industrial power towers, digital billboards, and other vehicles in heavy fog and rain, with neon advertisements and flying cars visible in the dystopian skyline.

events.description: ALL FOODS billboard exits the right side of the frame as camera moves forward

agents.ego_description: driving forward on the rain-slicked highway, passing the large yellow billboard

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large yellow commercial billboard with red text reading ALL FOODS
metal safety barrier with orange and white striped pattern
tall industrial electrical towers with multiple cable lines spanning the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a close view of a yellow ALL FOODS billboard on the right side of a rain-soaked elevated highway. The camera moves forward steadily, causing the billboard to exit the frame while revealing industrial power transmission towers ahead. Several vehicles are visible driving on the wet asphalt, and the heavy fog limits visibility of the distant cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway corridor with power infrastructure

events.description: large military-style truck passes quickly on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway through the industrial district, passing beneath power lines

notable_agents.action: large olive-green truck overtaking on the left lane

entered.detail: large yellow-green industrial structure with multiple levels and scaffolding
array of illuminated advertising screens showing various commercials

segments.scene_description: Driving through an industrial section of the elevated highway, with massive power transmission towers dominating the left side and a large yellow industrial complex visible. Digital billboards begin appearing on the left. A large truck overtakes on the left while other traffic moves through the rain. Flying vehicles can be seen in the foggy sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with immersive digital advertising walls

events.description: large digital billboard on right comes into close proximity, filling the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: driving past large digital advertisements on both sides of the highway

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements with blue and pink neon colors
distant futuristic skyscrapers barely visible through the heavy fog and rain

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the camera driving alongside a massive digital billboard wall on the right that dominates the foreground with bright neon advertisements. The industrial buildings have given way to more commercial digital signage on both sides. The highway continues into the foggy distance toward the illuminated cyberpunk city center, with vehicles navigating the wet road ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked elevated highway that transforms from a bleak industrial corridor into a neon-lit commercial district. It begins by passing a yellow ALL FOODS billboard on the right, moving steadily forward as the sign exits the frame to reveal towering industrial power transmission towers and heavy fog. As the camera drives deeper into this industrial zone, the scene shifts to include a large yellow complex and digital billboards on the left, while a large truck overtakes the vehicle amidst a sky filled with flying cars. The environment then expands into a commercial hub, where the industrial structures give way to a massive wall of bright neon advertisements dominating the right foreground. Finally, the camera continues along the wet asphalt, navigating through traffic toward the glowing, illuminated skyline of the cyberpunk city center.
